title: A Wonderful Create Mod Luncheon
description: a create mod addon revolving around food
body:
![overly grandiose text that says A Wonderful Create Mod Luncheon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb628133d8757a757fa66a1fadb74343efe7b398.png)
# Luncheon
is a create mod addon about food. That's it, really.

## Features
- a pipeline to automate Ice Cream
- methods to automate ice, along with automating snow and powdered snow
- several silly features (glass shards, baguettes)

### (planned)
- a port to fabric when create 6.0 comes out for that
- pasta & sandwiches

### The Mechanical Cooler
is the backbone of these new processing options, working like a colder Blaze Burner.
